content: Maker, cross-checked every disposition claim in SESSION-BRIEF.md against the actual disposition.json files pulled this cycle (9 ceo, 4 cto) -- counts match: ceo 6 accept/2 needs-approval/1 needs-revision, cto now 2 accept + 2 accept from this session's f5886d04/6cc3b341 wait -- corrected: cto is 3 accept (67f24fd5, 6df5bc78, f5886d04) + 1 needs-approval (6cc3b341). Flagging this as a check finding, not silently fixing the brief.

Maker, correction required: SESSION-BRIEF.md's cto turn does not misstate any individual trail's disposition, but the summary framing undercounts -- re-verified the file's actual cto paragraph lists all 4 trails individually with correct per-trail dispositions, no aggregate miscount was actually written to the file. Retracting seq 1's flag after re-reading the file itself rather than my own recollection -- EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001 applies to this check too.
Maker, verified the 7 'no cycles run yet' domains against .pmcro/trails/ listing -- confirmed no directories exist for coo, cfo, cro, cmo, clo, chro, domain-specialist. No fabricated history.
